select.if:
SELECT t.TABLE_NAME AS "name", c.COMMENTS AS "comments" FROM user_tables t, user_tab_comments c WHERE t.table_name = c.table_name
AND t.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME

SELECT t.tabname AS "name", c.COMMENTS AS "comments" FROM systables t, syscomms c WHERE t.tabid = c.tabid
AND t.tabname = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY t.tabname

SELECT t.table_name AS "name",t.TABLE_COMMENT AS "comments" FROM information_schema.`TABLES` t WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database())
AND t.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME

SELECT tbs.name AS "name", ds.value AS "comments" FROM sys.extended_properties ds LEFT JOIN sysobjects tbs ON ds.major_id=tbs.id WHERE ds.minor_id=0
AND tbs.name = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY tbs.name

SELECT t.TABLE_NAME AS "name", c.COMMENTS AS "comments" FROM dba_tables t, dba_tab_comments c WHERE t.table_name = upper(c.table_name)
AND t.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{nameWithoutSchema})
ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME

SELECT t.table_name AS "name",t.TABLE_COMMENT AS "comments" FROM information_schema.`TABLES` t WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database())
AND t.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME

SELECT tbs.name AS "name", ds.value AS "comments" FROM sys.extended_properties ds LEFT JOIN sysobjects tbs ON ds.major_id=tbs.id WHERE ds.minor_id=0
AND tbs.name = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY tbs.name

SELECT t.COLUMN_NAME AS "name", (CASE WHEN t.NULLABLE = 'Y' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS "isNull", (t.COLUMN_ID * 1) AS "formSort", '1' AS "isEdit", (t.COLUMN_ID * 10) AS "sort", c.COMMENTS AS "comments", decode(t.DATA_TYPE,'DATE',t.DATA_TYPE || '(' || t.DATA_LENGTH || ')', 'VARCHAR2', t.DATA_TYPE || '(' || t.DATA_LENGTH || ')', 'VARCHAR', t.DATA_TYPE || '(' || t.DATA_LENGTH || ')', 'NVARCHAR2', t.DATA_TYPE || '(' || t.DATA_LENGTH/2 || ')', 'CHAR', t.DATA_TYPE || '(' || t.DATA_LENGTH || ')', 'NUMBER',t.DATA_TYPE || (nvl2(t.DATA_PRECISION,nvl2(decode(t.DATA_SCALE,0,null,t.DATA_SCALE), '(' || t.DATA_PRECISION || ',' || t.DATA_SCALE || ')', '(' || t.DATA_PRECISION || ')'),'(18)')),t.DATA_TYPE) AS "jdbcType"
FROM user_tab_columns t, user_col_comments c
FROM dba_tab_columns t, dba_col_comments c
WHERE t.TABLE_NAME = c.table_name AND t.COLUMN_NAME = upper(c.column_name)
AND t.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{nameWithoutSchema})
ORDER BY t.COLUMN_ID

select c.colname AS "name", CASE WHEN c.coltype < 256 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS "isNull", (c.colno * 1) AS "formSort", '1' AS "isEdit", (c.colno * 10) AS "sort", c1.COMMENTS AS "comments", case WHEN coltype = 2 THEN 'integer' WHEN coltype = 3 THEN 'double' WHEN coltype = 10 THEN 'datetime' WHEN coltype = 12 THEN 'longtext' WHEN coltype in (269, 13) THEN 'varchar(' || TRIM(CAST(c.collength AS CHAR(50))) || ')' end AS "jdbcType"
from systables t, syscolumns c, syscolcomms c1
WHERE t.tabid = c.tabid and c1.tabid = c.tabid and c1.colno = c.colno
AND t.tabname = lower(#{nameWithoutSchema})
ORDER BY c.colno

SELECT t.COLUMN_NAME AS "name", (CASE WHEN t.IS_NULLABLE = 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS "isNull", (t.ORDINAL_POSITION * 1) AS "formSort",'1' AS "isEdit", (t.ORDINAL_POSITION * 10) AS "sort",t.COLUMN_COMMENT AS "comments",t.COLUMN_TYPE AS "jdbcType" FROM information_schema.`COLUMNS` t WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database())
AND t.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{name})
ORDER BY t.ORDINAL_POSITION

SELECT [name] = [Columns].name , [isNull] = [Columns].is_nullable , [formSort] = [Columns].column_id * 1, [isEdit] = '1', [sort] = [Columns].column_id * 10, [comments] = [Properties].value, [jdbcType] = case when [Types].name = 'nvarchar' then 'nvarchar('+cast(Columns.max_length/2 as nvarchar)+')' else [Types].name end FROM sys.tables AS [Tables] INNER JOIN sys.columns AS [Columns] ON [Tables].object_id = [Columns].object_id INNER JOIN sys.types AS [Types] ON [Columns].system_type_id = [Types].system_type_id AND is_user_defined = 0 AND [Types].name <> 'sysname' LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.extended_properties AS [Properties] ON [Properties].major_id = [Tables].object_id AND [Properties].minor_id = [Columns].column_id AND [Properties].name = 'MS_Description' WHERE 1=1
AND [Tables].name = upper(#{nameWithoutSchema})
ORDER BY [Columns].column_id

SELECT lower(cu.COLUMN_NAME) AS "columnName"
FROM user_cons_columns cu, user_constraints au
FROM dba_cons_columns cu, dba_constraints au
WHERE upper(cu.constraint_name) = au.constraint_name AND au.constraint_type = 'P' AND au.table_name = upper(#{nameWithoutSchema})
SELECT lower(au.COLUMN_NAME) AS columnName FROM information_schema.`COLUMNS` au WHERE au.TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database()) AND au.COLUMN_KEY='PRI' AND au.TABLE_NAME = upper(#{name})

SELECT syscolumns.name AS "columnName" FROM sysobjects INNER JOIN sysconstraints ON sysobjects.xtype in('PK') AND sysobjects.id = sysconstraints.constid inner JOIN syscolumns ON sysconstraints.id = syscolumns.id WHERE syscolumns.typestat=3 AND OBJECT_NAME(sysobjects.parent_obj) = upper(#{nameWithoutSchema})
